summary: Planned conservative non-mutating classifications for five open PR inventory items. No shared canonical exists for this shard, no security-sensitive item was detected, and close/merge/fix actions are not allowed or not supported by the hydrated evidence.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR with remaining author/check/maintainer review signals; keep it independent in this inventory shard.
Feature PR with failing checks and maintainer-review labels; no duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or close evidence.
Small docs PR with proof and passing docs checks; low-signal closeout is disabled, so keep independently for maintainer review.
Broad feature PR with waiting-on-author and unresolved review-preflight uncertainty; keep independent rather than close or merge.
Large standalone feature PR with passing checks but broad maintainer-review scope; no duplicate, supersession, or low-signal closure evidence.
